signal_assignment_note: No leads to assign signals to. All signal assignment awaits Batch 5 Ryedale raw data. When data arrives, BRAIN will run full waterfall: SSL → mobile → no_website → social_media_high_review. Minimum score 55 to email. Signal→framework map unchanged.

waterfall_logic.priority_1: ssl — PAS framework — subject: '[First name] — [town] [trade] website flagged Not Secure'
waterfall_logic.priority_2: mobile — PAS framework — subject: '[First name] — [town] [business] site isn't mobile-friendly'
waterfall_logic.priority_3: no_website — BAB framework — '[Business] — [town] [trade]: customers can't find you online' (only 4★+ active-review businesses)
waterfall_logic.priority_4: social_media_high_review — AIDA framework — '[First name] — [N] reviews but your site isn't ranking' (only 4.5★+ with 100+ reviews)
waterfall_logic.confirmed_winner: ssl → PAS → first-name subject — 3/3 INTERESTED leads used this combination. Prioritise SSL signal leads in Batch 5 above all others.
